title: My savings grow without my effort
subtitle: A release-and-allow energy statement for releasing the effort and sacrifice pattern around saving.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 38 of the MONEY program. Releases the belief that saving requires constant vigilance and sacrifice, and allows a new experience of money building automatically.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 38 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release-and-allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 38 of the MONEY program. It works with the pattern that saving requires willpower: the belief that a savings pot always needs defending against your own spending impulse.
I am ready to release all belief that saving is a struggle, that my savings are temporary, that money left alone will spend itself. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow savings that grow naturally, that stay, that build without my effort. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). This statement is adapted from the Day 38 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
